name: here-now-drive
description: Sync with here.now Drives and Sites

scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const dist=path.join(__dirname,'dist'); if(!fs.existsSync(dist)){fs.mkdirSync(dist,{recursive:true});console.log('📁 Created dist folder');} fs.copyFileSync(path.join(__dirname,'manifest.json'),path.join(dist,'manifest.json')); fs.copyFileSync(path.join(__dirname,'styles.css'),path.join(dist,'styles.css')); console.log('📄 manifest.json and styles.css copied to dist/');"
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Nanocult
